title: ImportError after upgrading Flask — JSONEncoder not found
description: After upgrading Flask from 2.2.x to 2.3.x, the application fails to start with an ImportError. The custom JSON encoder that handles datetime and Decimal serialization is broken because Flask removed flask.json.JSONEncoder in version 2.3.
steps_to_reproduce: Application fails to start with ImportError
expected_behavior: Application starts successfully and custom JSON serialization works for datetime and Decimal types
actual_behavior: Application fails to start due to ImportError
recent_changes: Updated requirements.txt to use Flask>=2.3.0 for security patches
